data.title: Atmus Opens Expanded Testing Laboratory at Quimper, France Site
data.description: Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc. (NYSE: ATMU), a prominent player in filtration and media solutions, has inaugurated a cutting-edge laboratory at its Quimper, France site. This move showcases the company's dedication to enhancing filtration technology and minimizing testing durations for clients. The upgraded facility bolsters Atmus' worldwide laboratory infrastructure, providing improved customer support and further solidifying its position as an industry leader.

data.title: J.Jill, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: J.Jill, Inc. shared financial updates for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on January 31, 2026. The company, listed on NYSE as JILL, declared a cash dividend of $0.09 per share. This dividend is set to be paid on April 28, 2026, to stockholders who are recorded as shareholders of the company's common stock by April 14, 2026. This quarterly dividend represents a 12.5% rise from the previous dividend and translates to an annualized dividend rate.

data.title: PropW Launches Hour Trader Challenge, Introducing a Faster Format for Crypto Prop Trading
data.description: Hong Kong witnessed the launch of PropW on March 31, 2026. This innovative crypto prop trading platform is established on CoinW's exchange infrastructure. The platform introduced the Hour Trader Challenge, an exclusive time-bound trading challenge aiming to condense the prop trading encounter into one single session.

data.title: Lilly to acquire Centessa Pharmaceuticals to advance treatments for sleep-wake disorders
data.description: Centessa has developed an OX2R agonist pipeline featuring a leading therapeutic candidate that shows great potential to enhance outcomes in various sleep-wake disorders. Lilly's recent acquisition of this pipeline expands its neuroscience portfolio and capabilities, marking a strategic move into the field of sleep medicine. This collaboration between the companies, based in Indianapolis and Boston, represents a significant step in advancing innovative treatments for these conditions.

data.title: AT&T Launches OneConnect, the First-Ever Single Subscription for Unlimited Connectivity
data.description: On March 31, 2026, AT&T announced the launch of AT&T OneConnect, offering a streamlined connectivity solution. This service includes wireless and home internet coverage for all devices under one subscription at a fixed monthly rate. Notably, AT&T stands out as the sole provider to offer this all-in-one connectivity solution currently in the market.

data.title: Skillsoft Appoints Art Gilliland to Board of Directors
data.description: Today, Skillsoft, a prominent AI-native skills management platform for the human + AI era, revealed that Art Gilliland has become a part of its Board of Directors starting from March 25, 2026. Gilliland, currently the Chief Executive Officer of Delinea, a renowned identity security firm, possesses over 25 years of expertise in supervising worldwide enterprise software and cybersecurity companies. Formerly in charge of the Symantec Enterprise Division at Broadcom, he managed numerous aspects of the operation.

data.title: U.S. GOLD CORP. DELIVERS ROBUST FEASIBILITY STUDY FOR CK GOLD PROJECT HIGHLIGHTING ATTRACTIVE ECONOMICS AND DETAILING RELATIVE LOW DEVELOPMENT RISK
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Cheyenne, Wyoming, U.S. Gold Corp. (NASDAQ: USAU) released the findings of the Feasibility Study (FS) regarding their CK Gold Project situated in southeast Wyoming. The study focuses on the development prospects for the wholly-owned CK Project.

data.title: Nike Gears Up For Q3 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Nike, Inc. will report its third-quarter earnings on March 31 after the market closes. Analysts predict earnings of 28 cents per share, a decrease from 54 cents per share last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue is $11.23 billion (compared to $11.27 billion last year). Nike has surpassed earnings estimates for 10 consecutive quarters. The company's stock closed at $51.24, dropping by 0.3% on Monday. For more insights, readers can view analyst ratings on the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga Pro. Visit Benzinga.com for the full story.

data.title: Diagens Biotechnology Raises US$101 Million in Hong Kong IPO; Shares More Than Double on First Day of Trading
data.description: Hangzhou Diagens Biotechnology Co., Ltd. made its debut on HKEX as its initial public offering was oversubscribed by an astonishing 1,073 times. The medical imaging AI company, listed under HKEX: 02526, started trading on the Main Board of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong on March 31, 2026. The closing price of the shares at the end of the trading day...

data.title: ATIS Expands its Footprint in Alberta Through Acquisition of Vinspec
data.description: A private equity firm from St. Louis, Thompson Street Capital Partners (TSCP), has revealed the acquisition of Vinspec by KJA, a subsidiary of ATIS, a TSCP portfolio company. ATIS is a reputed provider of elevator and escalator safety inspections, consulting, and managed services throughout North America. Vinspec is known for delivering thorough elevator and escalator consulting and inspection services to building owners, property managers, and architects. Thompson Street Capital Partners, based in St. Louis, continues to expand its portfolio with this recent acquisition in the field of elevator and escalator safety services.

data.title: Vinitaly 2026 Announces Masterclass Program Set to Challenge Assumptions and Bring Wine Professionals Together
data.description: In Verona, Italy, on March 31, 2026, Vinitaly, the top global wine and spirits exhibition taking place yearly, revealed details of its upcoming event. The program includes specialized masterclasses and blind tastings conducted by prominent personalities from the worldwide wine industry.
